channel.title: Permalinks on post categories
channel.description:
Hello :slight_smile:
In my WordPress backend I have custom permalinks to category and tags to put in Spanish like: - category --> categoria - tag -> etiqueta
In the frontend with react if I try to navigate to this archives pages from a post we have 404 because of that url is not set in the frontend like in the backend. How can I setup this in the frontend with Frontity?
thanks

item.title: Permalinks on post categories
item.dc:creator: cianespablo
item.description:
oh thank you! this was easier than I thought and above it was in the documentation that I thought I had reviewed

Read full topic

item.title: Permalinks on post categories
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
You can use the categoryBase and tagBase settings of wp-source

https://docs.frontity.org/api-reference-1/wordpress-source#state-source-categorybase

Read full topic

item.title: Permalinks on post categories
item.dc:creator: cianespablo
item.description:
Hello

In my WordPress backend I have custom permalinks to category and tags to put in Spanish like:

  • category --> categoria
  • tag -> etiqueta

In the frontend with react if I try to navigate to this archives pages from a post we have 404 because of that url is not set in the frontend like in the backend.
How can I setup this in the frontend with Frontity?

thanks

Read full topic
